entry.data:
CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS THIS MORNING, THEN PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS THIS AFTERNOON
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 50S
NORTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S
NORTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING EAST IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
HIGHS AROUND 80

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
HIGHS AROUND 70
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT
